title: Display Poser
description: Adds a GUI for block displays in which you can configure it's attributes, position, scale, rotation & More
body:
This mod introduces a graphical interface for block displays, which can be created using the command /createblockdisplay and customized further with /editblockdisplay.

Inspired by [Armor Poser](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-poser) this mod offers the following features:

**Features**

Create block displays by looking at a block and running /createblockdisplay; the display adopts the attributes of the block you're observing.

Modify the position, rotation, and scale of the block display via /editblockdisplay.

Change the block used in the block display.

Edit block attributes even after the display is created.

Clone the Block Display.

**Compatibility**

Supports version 1.21.7 & 10 in single-player mode.

Works with 1.21.7 & 10 Fabric multiplayer, provided the mod is installed on both the client and server sides.

**Pending Changes**

Billboard, Glowing, Glowing Hex
